title: test/e2e: Some healthcheck images exist only for amd64
body:
Some healthcheck images exist only for amd64:
- quay.io/libpod/alpine_healthcheck:latest
- quay.io/libpod/healthcheck:config-only
- quay.io/libpod/badhealthcheck:latest

We're thus forced to skip some e2e tests.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
